_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology.

_contextSnippet: able to show that our microtissues respond to MEK inhibition by suppressing ERK phosphorylation...enhanced drug effects can be observed...findings from our 3D microtissue model are predictive of in vivo response
details: Responded to MEK inhibition by suppressing ERK phosphorylation. Enhanced drug effects observed with longer exposure times (5 days vs 2 days). Drug response patterns were predictive of in vivo response
